summary: Comprehensive testing of Primary/Secondary venue role claiming rules. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests verified lock/open status display correctly for primaries vs non-primaries.
critical_code_review_comments: HostLogin component lacks data-testid attributes on select trigger and login button - recommend adding for better testability
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test events (UITEST_*) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Claiming rules fully tested. Key IDs: Whining Pig Downtown (88b01df3), Chloe (3b3566d6) is trivia primary, Chase (8e1389db) is bingo_karaoke primary. Nick (2d3a5242) is not a primary at this venue. Tests verify: locked events show 'Reserved for [name]' + opens date, primaries see 'Claim Event' button on their locked events, non-primaries get 403 when trying to claim locked events, blackouts auto-open events, Sunday deadline auto-opens events.

backend_apis: GET /api/events/claim-eligibility - Returns correct status (primary_only/open) for all unclaimed future events
POST /api/events/{id}/claim - Rejects non-primary users with 403 for primary-locked events
POST /api/events/{id}/claim - Allows primary to claim their locked events (200)
Blackout auto-release: Events open when primary has blackout on event date
Sunday deadline: Events open when prior Sunday has passed
No-primary venues: Events are open at venues without assigned primary
frontend_verification: Non-primary user (Nick) sees 'Reserved for [name]' text on locked events
Non-primary user sees 'Opens [date]' indicating when event becomes claimable
Non-primary user sees lock icon on locked events
Primary user (Chloe) sees 'Claim Event' button on HER locked trivia events
Primary user (Chloe) sees 'Reserved for Chase' on Music Bingo events (not her category)
Open events show normal 'Claim Event' button for all users

verification_screenshots.nick_current_week: Shows open event with Claim Event button (past Sunday deadline)
verification_screenshots.nick_future_week: Shows locked events with 'Reserved for [name]' and 'Opens [date]'
verification_screenshots.chloe_future_week: Shows Claim Event on her trivia, Reserved for Chase on bingo
